title: Weather Morning Report Settings
description: Configure the location and presentation defaults for the OpenPet weather report plugin.

locationName.title: Location name
locationName.description: Human-readable location name shown in pet messages.

locationQuery.title: Location query
locationQuery.description: Public location query sent to wttr.in or wttr.is.

language.title: Language
language.description: Language used for generated weather messages.

reportType.title: Report type
reportType.description: Primary period focus for the report.

announceOnRefresh.title: Announce on refresh
announceOnRefresh.description: Ask the pet to say the report when refresh completes.

cacheMaxAgeMinutes.title: Cache max age
cacheMaxAgeMinutes.description: Maximum cache age accepted when providers are unavailable.

includeSource.title: Include source
includeSource.description: Include the weather provider host in the pet message.
